properties.evidence: In the study cited above, the number needed to treat to prevent a single death from any cause and to prevent a single nonfatal myocardial infarction was 239 and 153, respectively.

rejected_candidates.text: A recently published trial comparing genetic mutations that confer high HDL versus low HDL has called into question the well established belief that HDL-C protects against CVD.
